title: Guardian Phase 1a — Config hardening
description: Rate limiting, input validation, cycle monitoring, 14 unit tests. All passing.

title: Guardian Phase 1b — Engine skeleton
description: Guardian engine canister with timer loop, stable storage, health endpoint. 17 unit tests passing.

title: Guardian Phase 1c — ICRC Index integration
description: Transaction fetching for ICP, ckBTC, ckETH via ICRC index canisters. Watermark tracking.

title: Guardian Phase 1d — Detection engine
description: Rule evaluation (A1/A3/A4), severity scoring, alert payload formatting.

title: Guardian Phase 1e — Integration tests + local deploy
description: 200 tests passing, zero clippy warnings, security review complete, README updated, v0.1-mvp tagged.

title: Guardian Phase 2b — Alert delivery via HTTPS outcall
description: Implement real HTTPS outcall delivery for alerts. Supports Discord webhooks, Slack webhooks, generic webhooks, email (Mailgun/SendGrid). Retry policy (max 3), cycle cost estimation, 48 new delivery tests (237 total). Zero clippy warnings. Committed e58ab93.

title: Guardian Phase 2d — Testnet deployment with live config sync
description: HMAC-SHA256 signing for webhook channels implemented. Local deployment: both canisters deployed, guardian_engine set as controller of guardian_config (verified dfx canister info). Smoke test passed: deployed config with Discord webhook, engine timer ticking, alert queue nominal. 273 tests passing (11 new HMAC tests). Testnet deployment blocked — identity has 0 ICP (needs dfx cycles convert with funded identity). All code production-ready; testnet deploy is ops task.

title: Guardian Phase 3 — Admin Dashboard Frontend
description: SvelteKit admin dashboard with 4 pages: Health Status (cycles, timers, watermarks), Configuration (user list + alert channels + detection rules), Alert History (searchable/sortable/paginated), System Stats (delivery rates, chain/severity breakdowns). Tailwind CSS dark theme. 200KB build output (<2MB limit). Mock data layer. adapter-static for asset canister deployment.

title: Set up Prospector cron
description: Configure cron job for Prospector agent to scan Upwork/LinkedIn every 6 hours.

title: Creator content calendar Week 2
description: Plan and schedule content creation tasks for Week 2, including blog posts, social media, and newsletters.

title: Mission Control Dashboard — All phases
description: Next.js dashboard with Task Board, Calendar, Projects, Memories, Docs, Team screens.

title: Guardian Phase 5 — Consumer onboarding UI
description: Build first-time-user landing, trust messaging, wallet connect entry, preset selection, and review/confirm flow for live Guardian canisters.

title: Guardian Phase 5 — Presets and settings page
description: Implement Safe/Balanced/Aggressive preset mapping, advanced controls for shipped config fields, allowlist management, and live config save/load UX.

title: Guardian Phase 5 — Alerts and status experience
description: Create consumer dashboard/status screen plus personal alerts/history UX with clear empty states, severity presentation, and live/missing-data handling.

title: Guardian Phase 5 — Wallet connect and auth integration
description: Add ICP-compatible wallet/auth flow, authenticated actor creation, principal-aware session state, protected consumer routes, and reconnect/disconnect behavior.

title: Guardian Phase 5 — Live canister frontend wiring
description: Wire consumer UI to live IC canisters `higkb-faaaa-aaaau-ae5cq-cai` and `dyqi7-riaaa-aaaau-afmla-cai`, remove ambiguous mock reliance, and verify config/alert contract behavior.
